TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqCon-dialog3_robo_bakan 2021s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: isu wa rengo.
S.PHON: isu wa ɾeŋo.
S.FORM: isu wa rengo.
S.PHON: isu wa ɾeŋo.
S.TRANSL: 是妳啊!講啊!
It's your turn! Speak!

S.FORM: ita na wisuta suupu tloong han na.
S.PHON: ita na wisuta suupu tlooŋ ħan na.
S.FORM: ita na wisuta suupu tloong han na.
S.PHON: ita na wisuta suupu tlooŋ ħan na.
S.TRANSL: 我們就先坐在一起.
Let's sit together first.

S.FORM: wisu ka seediq di ma kika.
S.PHON: wisu ka seediq di ma kika.
S.FORM: wisu ka seediq di ma kika.
S.PHON: wisu ka seediq di ma kika.
S.TRANSL: 有人過來了.
Someone's here.

S.FORM: mlawata ma aguh aguh aguh.
S.PHON: mlawata ma aguħ aguħ aguħ.
S.FORM: mlawata ma aguh aguh aguh.
S.PHON: mlawata ma aguħ aguħ aguħ.

TRANSL.notes: 我們就(對那個人)叫:「過來!過來!過來!」

S.TRANSL: 我們就 叫:「過來!過來!過來!」

TRANSL.notes: Let's call out (to that person): "Come! Come! Come!"

S.TRANSL: Let's call out : "Come! Come! Come!"

S.FORM: imahota kingan rusuq sino mesata na.
S.PHON: imaħota kiŋan ɾusuq sino mesata na.
S.FORM: imahota kingan rusuq sino mesata na.
S.PHON: imaħota kiŋan ɾusuq sino mesata na.
S.TRANSL: 我們就說:「我們來喝一瓶酒吧!」
"Let's drink a bottle of alcohol!" we'd say.

S.FORM: uN ma eh yaku do mosaku hmanguc sama kesa isu da munlamu peni egu kari isu han.
S.PHON: un ma eħ jaku do mosaku ħmaŋuʦ sama kesa isu da munlamu peni egu kaɾi isu ħan.
S.FORM: uN ma eh yaku do mosaku hmanguc sama kesa isu da munlamu peni egu kari isu han.
S.PHON: un ma eħ jaku do mosaku ħmaŋuʦ sama kesa isu da munlamu peni egu kaɾi isu ħan.

TRANSL.notes: 你就說「我先去主菜!」很多種話(可以說)啊!妳不是很多話?妳先說啊!

S.TRANSL: 你就說「我先去主菜!」很多種話 啊!妳不是很多話?妳先說啊!

TRANSL.notes: "I'll go cook some vegetables," you'd say. (There are) all kinds of words (to say)! Aren't you talkative? You go first!

S.TRANSL: "I'll go cook some vegetables," you'd say. all kinds of words ! Aren't you talkative? You go first!

S.FORM: yaku de maanu ye uka so begu qnuuqu mesaku ma.
S.PHON: jaku de maanu je uka so begu qnuuqu mesaku ma.
S.FORM: yaku de maanu ye uka so begu qnuuqu mesaku ma.
S.PHON: jaku de maanu je uka so begu qnuuqu mesaku ma.
S.TRANSL: 要說什麼啊?那我說:「有沒有酒啊?」
What should I say? "Is there any alcohol here?" I say.

S.FORM: un.
S.PHON: un.
S.FORM: un.
S.PHON: un.
S.TRANSL: 對.
Right.

S.FORM: niqan wa si ma maanu ka cikunta peni mesaku yaku a.
S.PHON: niqan wa si ma maanu ka ʦikunta peni mesaku jaku a.
S.FORM: niqan wa si ma maanu ka cikunta peni mesaku yaku a.
S.PHON: niqan wa si ma maanu ka ʦikunta peni mesaku jaku a.

TRANSL.notes: 有人就說:「有(酒)啊.」那我就說:「我們要用什麼配酒啊?」

S.TRANSL: 有人就說:「有 啊.」那我就說:「我們要用什麼配酒啊?」

TRANSL.notes: "There is (alcohol)", someone would say. Then, "What should we eat along with the alcohol?" I would say.

S.TRANSL: "There is ", someone would say. Then, "What should we eat along with the alcohol?" I would say.

S.FORM: uh skadiomu so nngari hini han ah mesasu han.
S.PHON: uħ skadiomu so nŋaɾi ħini ħan aħ mesasu ħan.
S.FORM: uh skadiomu so nngari hini han ah mesasu han.
S.PHON: uħ skadiomu so nŋaɾi ħini ħan aħ mesasu ħan.
S.TRANSL: 你先說:「我先找找看這裡剩下什麼.」

TRANSL.notes: So you say: "Let me see what (food) is left over here first."

S.TRANSL: So you say: "Let me see what is left over here first."

S.FORM: ima dadanta kesaunmu plawaaneta ka kiya gaga inu mesa.
S.PHON: ima dadanta kesaunmu plawaaneta ka kija gaga inu mesa.
S.FORM: ima dadanta kesaunmu plawaaneta ka kiya gaga inu mesa.
S.PHON: ima dadanta kesaunmu plawaaneta ka kija gaga inu mesa.
S.TRANSL: 我就說:「我們的朋友有誰呢?」「我們叫她吧!她在哪裡?」
"Who's our friend?" I'd say. "Let's call that person! Where is she?"

S.FORM: ga inu haruko ah c ceceta ha mesata han.
S.PHON: ga inu ħaɾuko aħ ʦ ʦeʦeta ħa mesata ħan.
S.FORM: ga inu haruko ah c ceceta ha mesata han.
S.PHON: ga inu ħaɾuko aħ ʦ ʦeʦeta ħa mesata ħan.
S.TRANSL: 我們會說:「我們的春子姊姊在哪裡呢?」
We would say: "Where is our sister Haruko?"

S.FORM: ma ye ukas a maanu mesa ka haruko.
S.PHON: ma je ukas a maanu mesa ka ħaɾuko.
S.FORM: ma ye ukas a maanu mesa ka haruko.
S.PHON: ma je ukas a maanu mesa ka ħaɾuko.
S.TRANSL: 春子就說:「要幹嘛?」
Haruko replies: "What?"

S.FORM: aguh eyahi mangan a patis awi baso nii a miisumian seno a.
S.PHON: aguħ ejaħi maŋan a patis awi baso nii a miisumian seno a.
S.FORM: aguh eyahi mangan a patis awi baso nii a miisumian seno a.
S.PHON: aguħ ejaħi maŋan a patis awi baso nii a miisumian seno a.
S.TRANSL: 過來!來拿一下這封Awi Baso 寄來的信.我們害怕妳先生啦!
Come! Come and take this letter from Awi Baso! We are afraind of your husband.

S.FORM: naqah seno mseyang sa mplawa mimah sino.
S.PHON: naqaħ seno msejaŋ sa mplawa mimaħ sino.
S.FORM: naqah seno mseyang sa mplawa mimah sino.
S.PHON: naqaħ seno msejaŋ sa mplawa mimaħ sino.
S.TRANSL: 丈夫很不好.聽說互相邀約喝酒的話他會罵人.
The husband is bad. People say he scolds if we invite each other to drink.

S.FORM: naqah roro beebu na wa haruko denu.
S.PHON: naqaħ ɾoɾo beebu na wa ħaɾuko denu.
S.FORM: naqah roro beebu na wa haruko denu.
S.PHON: naqaħ ɾoɾo beebu na wa ħaɾuko denu.
S.TRANSL: Roro很不好.他到現在還會打春子.
Roro is bad. He still beats Haruko.

S.FORM: miicu riyung miicu riyung roro wa haruko.
S.PHON: miiʦu ɾijuŋ miiʦu ɾijuŋ ɾoɾo wa ħaɾuko.
S.FORM: miicu riyung miicu riyung roro wa haruko.
S.PHON: miiʦu ɾijuŋ miiʦu ɾijuŋ ɾoɾo wa ħaɾuko.
S.TRANSL: 春子很怕Roro.
Haruko is very fraid of Roro.

S.FORM: har osaunmiyan a mnangiku mesa eyahi mangan tegami a m kesaunmu ma.
S.PHON: ħaɾ osaunmijan a mnaŋiku mesa ejaħi maŋan tegami a m kesaunmu ma.
S.FORM: har osaunmiyan a mnangiku mesa eyahi mangan tegami a m kesaunmu ma.
S.PHON: ħaɾ osaunmijan a mnaŋiku mesa ejaħi maŋan tegami a m kesaunmu ma.
S.TRANSL: 我假裝說:「來拿信啊!」
I'll pretend to say "Come take the letter!"

S.FORM: mkela naq a uN nangiunmu mesa eyah mang tegami a.
S.PHON: mkela naq a un naŋiunmu mesa ejaħ maŋ tegami a.
S.FORM: mkela naq a uN nangiunmu mesa eyah mang tegami a.
S.PHON: mkela naq a un naŋiunmu mesa ejaħ maŋ tegami a.
S.TRANSL: 她自己會知道我只是假裝說:「來拿信啊!」
She'll know that I'm just pretending in saying "Come take the letter!"

S.FORM: mke mkela riyung kari isu ha.
S.PHON: mke mkela ɾijuŋ kaɾi isu ħa.
S.FORM: mke mkela riyung kari isu ha.
S.PHON: mke mkela ɾijuŋ kaɾi isu ħa.
S.TRANSL: 妳真的很會說話.
You are a brillian talker!

S.FORM: un mesamiyan eyahi mang tegamisu mesa de miicu seno de kani eyah ma ado kesaun tegami de meyah kesaun ma.
S.PHON: un mesamijan ejaħi maŋ tegamisu mesa de miiʦu seno de kani ejaħ ma ado kesaun tegami de mejaħ kesaun ma.
S.FORM: un mesamiyan eyahi mang tegamisu mesa de miicu seno de kani eyah ma ado kesaun tegami de meyah kesaun ma.
S.PHON: un mesamijan ejaħi maŋ tegamisu mesa de miiʦu seno de kani ejaħ ma ado kesaun tegami de mejaħ kesaun ma.

TRANSL.notes: 我們說:「來拿信啊!」她會害怕丈夫,所以(通常)是不會來(和我們一起喝酒)的.但因為我們(假裝)說有(她的)信(要拿),她就會來了.

S.TRANSL: 我們說:「來拿信啊!」她會害怕丈夫,所以 是不會來 的.但因為我們 說有 信 ,她就會來了.

TRANSL.notes: We can say "Come take your letter!". She is afraid of her husband, so (usually) she wouldn't come (to drink with us). But becuase we (pretend to) say that there is a letter (for her), she will come.

S.TRANSL: We can say "Come take your letter!". She is afraid of her husband, so she wouldn't come . But becuase we say that there is a letter , she will come.

S.FORM: mkela naq a.
S.PHON: mkela naq a.
S.FORM: mkela naq a.
S.PHON: mkela naq a.
S.TRANSL: 她自己知道.
She knows that herself.

S.FORM: a m m mapa laqi diyan a mbseruxta mapa laqi di ma.
S.PHON: a m m mapa laqi dijan a mbseɾuxta mapa laqi di ma.
S.FORM: a m m mapa laqi diyan a mbseruxta mapa laqi di ma.
S.PHON: a m m mapa laqi dijan a mbseɾuxta mapa laqi di ma.
S.TRANSL: 白天背者孩子,我們會累.
Taking care of the children during the day, we get tired.

S.FORM: naqah ka taqi riyung duri ma malu ka prqedamiyan ncugin peni ma mesamiyan tikuh so rgerang begu qnuuqu uh uh uh uh hairazu begu naqah.
S.PHON: naqaħ ka taqi ɾijuŋ duɾi ma malu ka pɾqedamijan nʦugin peni ma mesamijan tikuħ so ɾgeɾaŋ begu qnuuqu uħ uħ uħ uħ ħaiɾa*u begu naqaħ.
S.FORM: naqah ka taqi riyung duri ma malu ka prqedamiyan ncugin peni ma mesamiyan tikuh so rgerang begu qnuuqu uh uh uh uh hairazu begu naqah.
S.PHON: naqaħ ka taqi ɾijuŋ duɾi ma malu ka pɾqedamijan nʦugin peni ma mesamijan tikuħ so ɾgeɾaŋ begu qnuuqu uħ uħ uħ uħ ħaiɾa*u begu naqaħ.

TRANSL.notes: 早上太愛睡也不好,反而偶爾用用爐灶(準備菜和酒)也很好啊,找找看錯誤的湯、壞的湯(酒)在哪裡!

S.TRANSL: 早上太愛睡也不好,反而偶爾用用爐灶 也很好啊,找找看錯誤的湯、壞的湯 在哪裡!

TRANSL.notes: It's bad to sleep to much during the day, and it's OK to use the stove (to prepare food and alcohol) sometimes, looking around for the mistaken soup, or the bad soup (alcohol)!

S.TRANSL: It's bad to sleep to much during the day, and it's OK to use the stove sometimes, looking around for the mistaken soup, or the bad soup !

S.FORM: begu naqah kiya ka begunami imahan sino de.
S.PHON: begu naqaħ kija ka begunami imaħan sino de.
S.FORM: begu naqah kiya ka begunami imahan sino de.
S.PHON: begu naqaħ kija ka begunami imaħan sino de.
S.TRANSL: 那就是我們喝酒要配的湯.

TRANSL.notes: That (mistaken) soup is what we will have with the alcohol.

S.TRANSL: That soup is what we will have with the alcohol.

S.FORM: kika m kika mimah sino de ka egu riyung ka kari di ma mhemuc mprengo di.
S.PHON: kika m kika mimaħ sino de ka egu ɾijuŋ ka kaɾi di ma mħemuʦ mpɾeŋo di.
S.FORM: kika m kika mimah sino de ka egu riyung ka kari di ma mhemuc mprengo di.
S.PHON: kika m kika mimaħ sino de ka egu ɾijuŋ ka kaɾi di ma mħemuʦ mpɾeŋo di.
S.TRANSL: 所以這個喝酒呢,已經講很多了.只是隨意聊天而已.
So we've already talked a lot about drinking alcohol. It's just random chatting.

S.FORM: zheyangla.
S.PHON: *ħejaŋla.
S.FORM: zheyangla.
S.PHON: *ħejaŋla.
S.TRANSL: 這樣啦.
That's it.

S.FORM: B.
S.PHON: b.
S.FORM: B.
S.PHON: b.
